speaker: rep
text: Good morning! Thank you so much for taking the time to meet with me today. I really appreciate it.

speaker: prospect
text: Yes, of course. We're interested in learning more about your solution.

speaker: rep
text: Excellent! I'd love to tell you about how our platform can help your team increase productivity and reduce costs by up to 40%.

speaker: prospect
text: That's interesting. We would need to consult internally with our management team before moving forward.

speaker: rep
text: Of course! So, what's your timeline for making a decision on this? Can we aim for a decision by end of week?

speaker: prospect
text: Hmm, we need some time. We would like to discuss this with our wider team and get their input.

speaker: rep
text: Absolutely, I understand. Let me send you a comprehensive written proposal with all the details, pricing, and implementation plan. You can review it with your colleagues.

speaker: rep
text: How does next week work for a follow-up call after you've had a chance to discuss internally?

speaker: prospect
text: Yes, that would be very helpful. Thank you for your understanding. We will review the proposal carefully.
